steps_completed.task: Create test file with mock setup: vi.mock session context, vi.mock hooks (useProbabilityEdit, useMarkets, useMarket)
Define fixtures: mockMarket, configuredSession, unconfiguredSession, mockOtherMarkets, mockContextMarketOutcomes, defaultMutationState, defaultQueryState
Write beforeEach: vi.clearAllMocks, set default returns for all mocked hooks
Test: shows setup message when session is not configured
Test: renders form with outcome select, probability slider, and submit button
Test: shows unconditional notation without context
Test: Add condition button adds a context row + disabled when no other markets
Test: context row market select shows only other active markets
Test: selecting a market in context row populates outcome dropdown
Test: remove button removes a context row
Test: notation updates when conditions are added
Test: submits correct payload with context conditions
Test: submit button shows conditional text and pending state
Test: shows success message with conditional prefix
Test: shows error message when mutation fails
